chinese.text: 觀自在菩薩，行深般若波羅蜜多時，照見五蘊皆空，度一切苦厄。
chinese.pinyin: Guānzìzài púsà, xíng shēn bōrě bōluómìduō shí, zhàojiàn wǔyùn jiē kōng, dù yīqiè kǔ è.

sanskrit.iast: Ārya-avalokiteśvaro bodhisattvo gambhīrāṃ prajñāpāramitācaryāṃ caramāṇo vyavalokayati sma: pañca-skandhās, tāṃś ca svabhāva-śūnyān paśyati sma.
sanskrit.devanagari: आर्य-अवलोकितेश्वरो बोधिसत्त्वो गम्भीरां प्रज्ञापारमिताचर्यां चरमाणो व्यवलोकयति स्म: पञ्च-स्कन्धास्, तांश्च स्वभाव-शून्यान् पश्यति स्म।

rows.english: When Avalokiteśvara Bodhisattva was practicing the profound prajñāpāramitā, he illuminated the five aggregates and saw that they are all empty, thus transcending all suffering.
divergence_notes: Sanskrit: vyavalokayati sma - imperfect tense unusual for sūtra style

chinese.text: 舍利子，色不異空，空不異色；色即是空，空即是色。受想行識亦復如是。
chinese.pinyin: Shèlìzǐ, sè bù yì kōng, kōng bù yì sè; sè jí shì kōng, kōng jí shì sè. Shòu xiǎng xíng shí yì fù rúshì.

sanskrit.iast: Iha Śāriputra rūpaṃ śūnyatā śūnyataiva rūpam, rūpān na pṛthak śūnyatā śūnyatāyā na pṛthag rūpam, yad rūpaṃ sā śūnyatā yā śūnyatā tad rūpam; evam eva vedanā-saṃjñā-saṃskāra-vijñānāni.
sanskrit.devanagari: इह शारिपुत्र रूपं शून्यता शून्यतैव रूपम्, रूपान् न पृथक् शून्यता शून्यतायाः न पृथग् रूपम्, यद् रूपं सा शून्यता या शून्यता तद् रूपम्; एवमेव वेदना-संज्ञा-संस्कार-विज्ञानानि।

tibetan.wylie: gzugs stong pa'o/ stong pa nyid gzugs so/ gzugs las stong pa nyid gzhan ma yin/ stong pa nyid las kyang gzugs gzhan ma yin no/

rows.english: Śāriputra, form is not different from emptiness, emptiness is not different from form; form is emptiness, emptiness is form. Feeling, perception, formation, and consciousness are also like this.

chinese.text: 舍利子，是諸法空相，不生不滅，不垢不淨，不增不減。
chinese.pinyin: Shèlìzǐ, shì zhūfǎ kōng xiāng, bù shēng bù miè, bù gòu bù jìng, bù zēng bù jiǎn.

sanskrit.iast: Iha Śāriputra sarva-dharmāḥ śūnyatā-lakṣaṇā, anutpannā aniruddhā, amalā avimalā, anūnā aparipūrṇāḥ.
sanskrit.devanagari: इह शारिपुत्र सर्व-धर्माः शून्यता-लक्षणा, अनुत्पन्ना अनिरुद्धा, अमला अविमला, अनूना अपरिपूर्णाः।

rows.english: Śāriputra, the emptiness characteristic of all dharmas is: not arising, not ceasing; not defiled, not pure; not increasing, not decreasing.

chinese.text: 是故空中，無色，無受想行識，
chinese.pinyin: Shìgù kōng zhōng, wú sè, wú shòu xiǎng xíng shí,

sanskrit.iast: Tasmāc Chāriputra śūnyatāyāṃ na rūpaṃ na vedanā na saṃjñā na saṃskārāḥ na vijñānam.
sanskrit.devanagari: तस्माच् छारिपुत्र शून्यतायां न रूपं न वेदना न संज्ञा न संस्काराः न विज्ञानम्।

rows.english: Therefore, in emptiness there is no form, no feeling, perception, formation, or consciousness;

chinese.text: 無眼耳鼻舌身意，無色聲香味觸法，
chinese.pinyin: wú yǎn ěr bí shé shēn yì, wú sè shēng xiāng wèi chù fǎ,

rows.english: no eyes, ears, nose, tongue, body, or mind; no forms, sounds, smells, tastes, tangibles, or mental objects;

chinese.pinyin: wú yǎn jiè, nǎizhì wú yìshí jiè.

rows.english: no eye-element, up to and including no mind-consciousness element.

chinese.text: 無無明，亦無無明盡，乃至無老死，亦無老死盡。
chinese.pinyin: Wú wúmíng, yì wú wúmíng jìn, nǎizhì wú lǎosǐ, yì wú lǎosǐ jìn.

sanskrit.iast: Na-avidyā na-avidyā-kṣayo yāvan na jarā-maraṇaṃ na jarā-maraṇa-kṣayo.
sanskrit.devanagari: न-अविद्या न-अविद्या-क्षयो यावन् न जरा-मरणं न जरा-मरण-क्षयो।

rows.english: No ignorance and no ending of ignorance, up to and including no old age and death, and no ending of old age and death.
divergence_notes: Sanskrit: Uses kṣaya (destruction) instead of standard nirodha (cessation) - evidence of back-translation (Nattier 1992)

chinese.text: 無苦集滅道，無智亦無得，以無所得故。
chinese.pinyin: Wú kǔ jí miè dào, wú zhì yì wú dé, yǐ wú suǒ dé gù.

sanskrit.iast: Na duḥkha-samudaya-nirodha-mārgā. Na jñānaṃ, na prāptir na-aprāptiḥ.
sanskrit.devanagari: न दुःख-समुदय-निरोध-मार्गा। न ज्ञानं, न प्राप्तिर् न-अप्राप्तिः।

rows.english: No suffering, origination, cessation, or path; no wisdom and no attainment, because there is nothing to attain.

chinese.text: 菩提薩埵，依般若波羅蜜多故。心無罣礙，無罣礙故。無有恐怖，遠離顚倒夢想，究竟涅槃。
chinese.pinyin: Pútísàduǒ, yī bōrě bōluómìduō gù. Xīn wú guà'ài, wú guà'ài gù. Wú yǒu kǒngbù, yuǎnlí diāndǎo mèngxiǎng, jiūjìng nièpán.

sanskrit.iast: Tasmāc Chāriputra aprāptitvād bodhisattvasya prajñāpāramitām āśritya viharaty acittāvaraṇaḥ. Cittāvaraṇa-nāstitvād atrastro viparyāsa-atikrānto niṣṭhā-nirvāṇa-prāptaḥ.
sanskrit.devanagari: तस्माच् छारिपुत्र अप्राप्तित्वाद् बोधिसत्त्वस्य प्रज्ञापारमितामाश्रित्य विहरत्यचित्तावरणः। चित्तावरण-नास्तित्वाद् अत्रस्त्रो विपर्यास-अतिक्रान्तो निष्ठा-निर्वाण-प्राप्तः।

rows.english: Because bodhisattvas rely on prajñāpāramitā, their minds are without obstruction. Without obstruction, they have no fear, are far removed from inverted views and dreams, and attain ultimate nirvāṇa.

chinese.text: 三世諸佛，依般若波羅蜜多故，得阿耨多羅三藐三菩提。
chinese.pinyin: Sānshì zhū fó, yī bōrě bōluómìduō gù, dé ānòuduōluó sānmiǎo sānpútí.

sanskrit.iast: Tryadhva-vyavasthitāḥ sarva-buddhāḥ prajñāpāramitām āśrityānuttarāṃ samyak-saṃbodhim abhisaṃbuddhāḥ.

rows.english: All buddhas of the three times, relying on prajñāpāramitā, attain anuttarā-samyak-saṃbodhi.

chinese.text: 故知般若波羅蜜多，是大神咒，是大明咒，是無上咒，是無等等咒，能除一切苦，眞實不虛故。
chinese.pinyin: Gùzhī bōrě bōluómìduō, shì dà shén zhòu, shì dà míng zhòu, shì wúshàng zhòu, shì wú děngděng zhòu, néng chú yīqiè kǔ, zhēnshí bù xū gù.

sanskrit.iast: Tasmāj jñātavyam: prajñāpāramitā mahā-mantro mahā-vidyā-mantro 'nuttara-mantro 'samasama-mantraḥ, sarva-duḥkha-praśamanaḥ, satyam amithyatvāt.
sanskrit.devanagari: तस्माज् ज्ञातव्यम्: प्रज्ञापारमिता महा-मन्त्रो महा-विद्या-मन्त्रो ऽनुत्तर-मन्त्रो ऽसमसम-मन्त्रः, सर्व-दुःख-प्रशमनः, सत्यमम् इथ्यत्वात्।

rows.english: Therefore know that prajñāpāramitā is the great mantra, the mantra of great illumination, the supreme mantra, the unequalled mantra, which can remove all suffering; it is true and not false.

chinese.text: 說般若波羅蜜多咒，卽說咒曰：揭帝揭帝，波羅揭帝，波羅僧揭帝，菩提僧莎訶。
chinese.pinyin: Shuō bōrě bōluómìduō zhòu, jí shuō zhòu yuē: Jiēdì jiēdì, bōluó jiēdì, bōluó sēng jiēdì, pútí sēng suōhē.

sanskrit.iast: Prajñāpāramitāyām ukto mantraḥ. Tadyathā: Oṃ gate gate pāragate pārasaṃgate bodhi svāhā.
sanskrit.devanagari: प्रज्ञापारमितायामुक्तो मन्त्रः। तद्यथा: ॐ गते गते पारगते पारसंगते बोधि स्वाहा।

tibetan.wylie: tad+ya thA/ oM ga te ga te pA ra ga te pA ra saM ga te bo d+hi swA hA/

rows.english: Therefore proclaim the prajñāpāramitā mantra, proclaim the mantra that says: Gate gate pāragate pārasaṃgate bodhi svāhā.
